prompt: Create a cinematic golden-hour portrait of an adult non-Black brunette woman sitting beside the window inside a dimly lit coastal train, inspired by the source scene but not copying any real person or identity. A vintage coastal train carriage with dark muted green interior, softly blurred passengers farther down the aisle, tiny red signal lights and warm amber reflections across metal and glass. Outside the window, a bright overexposed coastline glows in late afternoon sunlight. Photorealistic cinematic editorial photography, nostalgic 35mm film aesthetic, portrait 4:5, shallow depth of field, soft golden sunlight on one side of the face, gentle shadow on the other side, warm orange halation, organic film grain, no text, no logo, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic golden-hour portrait of an adult non-Black brunette woman sitting beside the window inside a dimly lit coastal train, inspired by the source scene but not copying any real person or identity. A vintage coastal train carriage with dark muted green interior, softly blurred passengers farther down the aisle, tiny red signal lights and warm amber reflections across metal and glass. Outside the window, a bright overexposed coastline glows in late afternoon sunlight. Photorealistic cinematic editorial photography, nostalgic 35mm film aesthetic, portrait 4:5, shallow depth of field, soft golden sunlight on one side of the face, gentle shadow on the other side, warm orange halation, organic film grain, no text, no logo, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感黄金时刻的人像，拍摄一位 成年非裔深褐色头发女性 坐在 光线昏暗的海岸列车 的窗边，灵感源自原始场景，但不得复制任何真实人物或身份。场景为 带有深哑光绿色内饰的复古海岸列车车厢，过道远处的乘客呈现柔和的模糊感，微小的红色信号灯以及琥珀色的暖光在金属和玻璃上反射。窗外，明亮且过曝的海岸线在午后的阳光下熠熠生辉。写实电影级编辑摄影，怀旧 35mm 胶片美学，人像比例 4:5，浅景深，脸部一侧有柔和的金色阳光，另一侧有柔和的阴影，温暖的橙色光晕，自然的胶片颗粒感，无文字，无 Logo，无水印。
